name: Ora Banda Mining Ltd
analysis: It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.3200, stop A$0.9850, target A$1.4950 (0.52:1) — then trail it.
